title: heptapleurum urdanetense
intro: Heptapleurum urdanetense, also known as Urdaneta's Schizocarp or commonly referred to as 'Urdaneta's', is a plant species in the family Araliaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heptapleurum urdanetense include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
